releaseNotes: Added cross-map copy/paste support for moving selected objects between stadium files.
Added paste capacity checks for HaxBall object limits before inserting copied objects.
Added safer HaxBall compatibility validation with more accurate Critical, Warning and Info severity levels.
Added Safe Export Report with object counts and compatibility summary after saving/exporting.
Added Selection Statistics with selected object counts, bounds and paste cost information.
Added cleanup tools for safe issue cleanup, unused vertexes and unused traits.
Improved Measure Tool with live coordinate data, vertex snapping, vertex locking and guide corner snap points.
Added canvas-based rotate handle for selected objects and multi-selection groups.
Improved curved segment hitboxes and curve-related export safety.
Fixed possible overflow crash during undo/snapshot creation with unusual numeric values.
Updated HaxStudio UI version labels to 1.3.0.
